title: The Dragon's Quest
description: Help the dragons find their lost treasures scattered across the city! Collect all the magical spots to complete the hunt.
imageAlt: Dragons flying over a magical city

s1.name: The Dragon's Garden
s1.hint: Look for the red door with a golden knocker.
s1.imageAlt: Lush green garden with stone statues

s2.name: The Crystal Tower
s2.hint: Follow the blue mosaic path east.
s2.imageAlt: Tall tower with sparkling crystal panels

s3.name: The Whispering Well
s3.hint: Listen carefully by the stone well.
s3.collectedText: The well echoes with ancient magic! 🌊
s3.imageAlt: Old stone well with glowing water
